title: A Night at the Flagon
description: The Rusty Flagon is busy tonight. Locals fill the tables and Bram Holdfast watches from behind the bar. He knows things — if you can get him talking.
customIntroduction: Warm light and the smell of ale spill out as you push through the door of the Rusty Flagon. The common room is busy — locals hunched over their drinks at scattered tables, low conversation filling the smoky air. Behind the long bar counter to the north, Bram Holdfast wipes down a tankard without looking up. He always knows who's walked in.
customContext: Social encounter inside a tavern common room. The player enters from the south door. Bram Holdfast (the tavern keeper) works behind the bar counter along the north wall — he is the primary information source and should speak in a wary, knowing manner. Three villager patrons are seated at tables throughout the room. All NPCs are neutral; no combat is expected. The AIDM should make the tavern feel lived-in and atmospheric, with Bram as the most interesting conversationalist and the villagers offering local colour and rumour.
